---
title: "Assignment 5"
author: "Christina Treacy and Hayden Waters"
date: "May 29, 2026"
format: pdf
editor: visual
---

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(here)
library(usethis)
library(lubridate)
library(broom)
```

```{r}
1 + 1
```

You can add options to executable code like this

```{r}
#| echo: false
2 * 2
```

The `echo: false` option disables the printing of code (only output is displayed).
